description: Accounts in Arabic script. Reused for Hebrew script jottings. One of the Hebrew sections contains a name: "I wrote this for myself, the talmid (student/scholar) Avraham b. Menashshe may his end be good (סופיה טב) b. [...] b. Meshullam."
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
